title: OAV Result 2026 - Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Entrance Exam Results

detail.title: OAV Result 2026 - Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Entrance Exam Results
detail.short_info: OAV Result 2026: The Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Pasna Result 2026 will be released soon on bseodisha.ac.in. Stay tuned for updates and the direct link to check your OAVET/OMAVET results online.

sections.heading: OAV Result 2026 - Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Entrance Exam Results

content.text: OAV Result 2026: The Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha) is expected to declare the OAVET 2026 results soon on bseodisha.ac.in. Students can check their OAV results 2026 online by entering roll number and date of birth once the link is activated. Keep visiting the official website for the latest updates and direct link.

items: Result Status: Expected Soon
Exam Name: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Entrance Test (OAVET 2026)
Conducting Body: Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha)
Courses: Admission to Class VI and Lateral Entry to Classes VII-IX (2026-27 Session)
Result Available At: bseodisha.ac.in (primary); also check oav.edu.in
Documents Required: Roll Number and Date of Birth

sections.heading: OAV Result 2026 Direct Link - Check Here

rows: Visit Official Website → (Link to be activated soon)

sections.heading: How to Check OAV Result 2026 Online?

content.text: Once released, students can check their OAV result 2026 for OAVET by following these steps:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to bseodisha.ac.in
Find Results Section: Look for "Latest Announcements" or "Examination/Results" on homepage
Select Your Exam: Click on OAVET 2026 or Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Entrance Result link
Enter Details: Input your Roll Number and Date of Birth
Submit & View: Click "Submit" to view your scorecard
Download: Save or print the result PDF for admission process

content.text: To check OAV results 2026 once available, students should keep the following details ready:

items: Roll Number (as on admit card)
Date of Birth
Registration Number (if required)
Exam details (Class applied for)

content.text: After the result is declared and you view your OAV result 2026:

items: Display the scorecard on screen
Click on "Download" or "Print" option
Save the PDF to your device
Take printouts for counselling and admission
Verify all details (name, marks, rank) are correct
